coreClaim: Knowledge source uploads reject files larger than 50 MB before reading browser bytes, base64-encoding, or invoking the upload command.

inScope: Add a knowledge-source-specific upload size limit to the shared API wrapper.
Keep existing JSON/base64 upload behavior for files within the configured limit.
Add a focused unit test for oversized and in-limit knowledge source uploads.
outOfScope: Replace the upload transport with multipart or streaming.
Change Rust storage write behavior or accepted knowledge source extensions.
Change import/export, backup, or profile migration behavior.

steps: Confirm knowledgeSourcesApi.upload calls fileToUploadPayload(file) without maxBytes or tooLargeMessage.
Trace fileToUploadPayload reads file.arrayBuffer() after only enforcing size when maxBytes is provided.
beforeEvidence: git show origin/refactor:src/shared/api/integration-utility-api.ts shows knowledgeSourcesApi.upload calling fileToUploadPayload(file) with no options.
src/shared/api/file-payload.ts only rejects oversized uploads when options.maxBytes is defined.

riskClaimMatrix.coreClaim: Oversized knowledge source uploads fail before browser memory/base64 expansion.
legacyPathsOrFormats: No legacy data format changed; existing accepted knowledge source files under the limit still use the same JSON payload shape.
positiveRowsTested: 4-byte text/plain file encodes to base64 and invokes knowledge_source_upload with the existing payload shape.
negativeRowsTested: Should-not-match row: 50 MB + 1 byte file rejects with the knowledge-source size error, arrayBuffer call count remains 0, and invokeTauri is not called.
groundTruthFacts: Harness-proven: MAX_KNOWLEDGE_SOURCE_UPLOAD_BYTES + 1 rejects with the knowledge-source size error in src/shared/api/integration-utility-api.test.ts.
Harness-proven: the oversized upload leaves arrayBuffer call count at 0 and invokeTauri call count at 0.

edgeRowsTested: Oversized file: rejects before reading bytes and before storage invocation.
In-limit file: still encodes and calls knowledge_source_upload with name, type, size, and base64.
negativeRowsTested: Oversized file does not call file.arrayBuffer().
Oversized file does not call invokeTauri().
afterEvidence: pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/api/integration-utility-api.test.ts: 1 test file passed, 2 tests passed.
